ddls:
CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the instructor */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the instructor belongs to */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Location of the instructor's office */,
  "office_hours" TEXT /* Office hours of the instructor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the student */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major field of study for the student */,
  "year_of_study" TEXT /* Year of study (e.g., Freshman, Sophomore, Junior, Senior) */,
  "gpa" TEXT /* Current GPA of the student */,
  "adviser_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student's academic adviser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_adviser_id FOREIGN KEY ("adviser_id") REFERENCES advisers ("adviser_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollment" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment record */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the student is enrolled in */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolled in the course */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment */,
  "status" INTEGER /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., Active, Withdrawn) */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade received by the student in the course */,
  "is_waitlisted" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the student is on the waitlist */,
  "waitlist_position" INTEGER /* Position of the student on the waitlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollment_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollment_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission record */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course requiring permission */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department responsible for granting permission */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for department inquiries regarding permissions */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the permission was approved (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material record */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the material is associated with */,
  "material_type" TEXT /* Type of material (e.g., Book, Article) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the material */,
  "material_description" TEXT /* Description of the material */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the material was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., Room 101) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the location */,
  "building_name" TEXT /* Name of the building where the location is situated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "delivery_modes" (
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delivery mode */,
  "mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the delivery mode (e.g., Face-to-Face, Online) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the delivery mode */,
  "is_hybrid" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the delivery mode is hybrid */,
  "online_platform" TEXT /* Platform used for online delivery (e.g., Zoom, Google Meet) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., Open, Closed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the status is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "advisers" (
  "adviser_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each adviser */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the adviser */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the adviser */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the adviser */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the adviser belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adviser_id")
)
